## Release Summary

This release contains the latest desktop app build for CPA-managed Codex auth pools.

## Curated Notes

{{CURATED_NOTES}}

## Downloads

- `cpa-control-center-windows-amd64.exe`  
  Windows executable for direct desktop use.

- `cpa-control-center-macos-universal.zip`  
  macOS universal package. Unzip it to get `cpa-control-center.app`.

- `SHA256SUMS.txt`  
  Checksums for the published release assets.

## Notes

- Existing local settings and state are preserved across upgrades.
- macOS users may need to right-click the app and choose `Open` on first launch.
- This release workflow appends the autogenerated GitHub changelog below.
- Curated version highlights are pulled from `CHANGELOG.md` when the current tag has a matching section.
